competitors.name: Gardenscapes
competitors.core_mechanic: Players complete match-3 puzzle levels to earn stars, which are spent to restore a neglected garden. Levels feature explosive power-ups, useful boosters, and chain-reaction mechanics. Over 16,000 levels with seasonal events and limited-time challenges providing new gameplay mechanics.
competitors.meta_loop: Completing puzzles earns stars → stars unlock garden restoration tasks → restored areas reveal story progression with butler character Austin. Seasonal and event layers add daily engagement.
stress_mechanisms: Lives/energy system (5 lives, refills over time or via IAP)
Move-count limits per level
Booster depletion on failed level exit
Time-limited competition events with score pressure
Progressive difficulty spikes designed to force booster use
monetization: IAP: boosters, extra moves, coin bundles
competitors.emotional_positioning: 治愈/叙事沉浸（家园修复叙事 + 轻度故事）
user_review_pains: pay-to-win：竞技/限时活动中不付费几乎无法通关
关卡难度人为拔高，随机掉落被怀疑有意操纵
退出关卡会消耗体力和助攻器，惩罚感强
虚假广告：宣传素材展示的玩法与实际游戏不符
频繁价格上涨，活动奖励缩水，老玩家流失
strengths: 叙事+消除深度融合，情感钩子强
超16000关卡保证超长留存生命周期
超强品牌认知度，生命周期收入超36亿美元
weaknesses: 能量/体力系统与治愈定位相矛盾，制造挫败感
商业化激进，后期深度付费玩家才能顺畅推进
虚假广告引发大量用户信任危机

competitors.name: Township
competitors.core_mechanic: Players build and manage a farm town—harvesting crops, operating factory chains, fulfilling orders, and expanding territory. A match-3 mini-game component appears during 'Adventure' events. Social 'Regatta' competitions pit teams against each other in timed task challenges.
competitors.meta_loop: Fulfill orders → earn coins/XP → expand farm buildings and factories → unlock new crops/goods → participate in weekly Regatta team competition. Social layer (co-op teams) drives daily engagement.
stress_mechanisms: Production timers (hours-long factory wait times)
Regatta time pressure with competitive team tasks
Resource scarcity driving IAP for Township Cash
Match-3 event levels with move limits and lives
Co-op social obligation pressure
monetization: IAP: Township Cash (premium currency) for speedups and rare items
IAP: Growth Packs and Festival Sales bundles
competitors.emotional_positioning: 社交/建设成就感（社区归属 + 建设里程碑）
user_review_pains: Regatta任务设计不合理，要求低等级成员完成高难度任务
生产等待时间过长，迫使消费加速货币
活动难度陡增，Township Cash消耗远超奖励价值
合作社压力：队友不均等贡献导致团队矛盾
经济系统多次调整，额外步数成本暴涨，奖励未同步
strengths: 社交/团队玩法增强粘性，600M下载量
城镇建设视觉成就感强，10年生命周期
IAP变现效率高，2024年收入4.03亿美元
weaknesses: 城建+农场+消除三类玩法混搭，核心定位不清晰
社交压力系统（Regatta）对独游玩家不友好
等待时间设计本质是付费墙，长期玩家疲劳感强

competitors.name: Fishdom
competitors.core_mechanic: Players complete match-3 puzzle levels—swapping tiles to create matches triggering chain reactions with firecrackers, depth bombs, dynamite, and lightning power-ups. Puzzle rewards are used to purchase fish, aquatic plants, and decorations to customize a personal aquarium.
competitors.meta_loop: Solve match-3 puzzles → earn puzzle currency → spend currency on aquarium customization (fish species, decor, tank expansions) → visual aquarium serves as passive reward showcase.
stress_mechanisms: Lives/energy system (lost on failure or level exit)
Move-count limits per level
Difficulty spikes designed to exhaust boosters
Season Pass time pressure
Limited-time expedition events
monetization: IAP: boosters, extra moves, coin bundles
competitors.emotional_positioning: 治愈/收集（水族馆美化 + 鱼类收集乐趣）
user_review_pains: 虚假广告：宣传视频展示的碰撞/策略玩法（pin-pulling等）与实际match-3完全不同
Season Pass单季价格大幅涨价（50%涨幅），玩家强烈抵制
后期关卡几乎不用助攻器无法通关，隐性付费墙
2024年更新削减游戏时长和奖励，同时提高价格
账单异常扣款且客服响应迟缓，信任危机
strengths: 水族馆视觉呈现精美，差异化情感钩子
生命周期收入超20亿美元，品牌成熟
鱼类/装饰收集机制增强长期留存
weaknesses: 严重依赖误导性广告吸量，与实际玩法不符引发玩家背叛感
商业化过度激进，赛季通行证涨价加速核心用户流失
match-3核心玩法与Gardenscapes高度同质，品牌差异度不足

revenue_data.note: 2024年收入小幅下滑，具体数字未公开披露

competitors.name: Candy Crush Saga
competitors.core_mechanic: Classic match-3: swap adjacent candies to match 3+ in a row, triggering chain reactions. Special candies include Striped Candies, Wrapped Candies, and Color Bombs. Over 16,000 levels (45-60 new levels added weekly). Occasional tournament events like 'All Stars' with competitive leaderboards.
competitors.meta_loop: Clear levels → advance episode map → unlock new worlds. Social layer via Facebook friends for lives. Competitive All Stars tournament creates seasonal engagement spikes. No build/decor meta; progression is pure level advancement.
stress_mechanisms: 5-lives system (30-min per life regeneration)
Move-count limits per level
Time-limit levels in certain modes
Gold bar scarcity for extra moves/lives
Competitive tournament leaderboard pressure
Aggressive pop-up purchase prompts after failure
monetization: IAP: Gold bars (lives, extra moves, boosters)
competitors.emotional_positioning: 竞技/大众休闲（简单上手 + 关卡征服感 + 社交攀比）
user_review_pains: 体力系统限制每次游玩仅15分钟，打断沉浸感
后期关卡设计不用付费几乎无法通关，强制付费感强
金条消耗设计不合理：补充体力需12金条，助攻器15金条+，起步消费$5
频繁弹出购买提示，反复打断游戏流
竞技赛事（All Stars）门槛高，普通玩家参与感弱
strengths: 全球最成功休闲手游IP，273M月活用户
极低学习曲线，普世吸引力最强
2024年收入约10.9亿美元，连续三年超10亿
weaknesses: 纯关卡推图无建造/叙事Meta层，长期留存依赖惯性而非情感绑定
体力系统是最高频投诉点，与用户'想持续玩'的需求直接对立
无差异化视觉世界观，全球竞品高度模仿导致同质化
